--- SOURCE 1: Veterinary Diagnostic Imaging Telemedicine Consultants | IDEXX US ---
URL: https://www.idexx.com/en/veterinary/diagnostic-imaging-telemedicine-consultants/telemedicine-consultants/

SUMMARY:
IDEXX Veterinary Telemedicine Consultants provide assistance with radiology, cardiology, diagnostic imaging and specialty services.

FULL CONTENT:
# IDEXX Telemedicine Consultants

Accurate reports. Actionable advice. Available 24/7.

![](https://www.idexx.com/media/filer_public_thumbnails/filer_public/c4/41/c441225f-3892-4c1f-8490-8f65e119edb4/telemedicine-x-ray-masthead-with-blue-bar.png__1000x1000_crop_subsampling-2.png)
![](https://www.idexx.com/media/filer_public_thumbnails/filer_public/4d/ad/4dad1604-47ab-4086-81c3-6078d6df81e4/di-telemed-quality-assurance.jpg__1200x1200_q80_subsampling-2.jpg)

## Unmatched quality for every case.

Whether you have a challenging case or a routine one, IDEXX Telemedicine Consultants provides comprehensive diagnostic insights whenever you need them. Supported by board-certified specialists and peer-reviewed quality assurance, we help you deliver the highest standard of patient care with confidence.

## Multiple disciplines, one click away.

Tap into the world’s largest telespecialist network for accurate and actionable reports that support your treatment plans.

![](https://www.idexx.com/media/filer_public_thumbnails/filer_public/50/27/502749f8-36a9-4f03-babc-68dbda89d238/telemedicine-radiology-assessments-x-ray.png__800x600_crop_subsampling-2.png)

### Radiology assessments

Make the most of your digital imaging capabilities. Our robust radiology team offers specialized interpretations and dedicated specialists for MRI, CT, and more.

![](https://www.idexx.com/media/filer_public_thumbnails/filer_public/0a/21/0a215f09-820e-4ceb-b648-e1d22707642c/telemedicine-cardiology-assessments-x-ray.png__800x600_crop_subsampling-2.png)

### Cardiology assessments

Consult with world-class cardiologists on everything from pre-op assessments to in-depth cardiology evaluations.

![](https://www.idexx.com/media/filer_public_thumbnails/filer_public/80/b3/80b34c90-8821-48ed-bab3-7c399db328eb/telemedicine-specialty-services-vet-and-dog.png__800x600_crop_subsampling-2.png)

### Specialty services

Get a second opinion or treatment recommendation from a respected colleague with deep knowledge in a niche field.

[Submit a case](http://www.vetmedstat.com/)

Not signed up yet? [Contact us to get started >](#form)

![](https://www.idexx.com/media/filer_public_thumbnails/filer_public/f6/e3/f6e3a966-67ae-458e-99cb-ad2d40049803/telemedicine-vet-with-golden-retriever.png__1200x1200_subsampling-2.png)

## Smarter tools for a smoother workflow.

To complement our network of specialists, we also offer a suite of tools to help you take action quickly. Submit cases securely via IDEXX Web PACS Software, and connect seamlessly with IDEXX Telemedicine Specialists through our VetMedStat platform. Our AI-enabled case submission workflow ensures that our specialists have everything they need to deliver accurate and actionable recommendations, every time.

![](https://www.idexx.com/media/filer_public_thumbnails/filer_public/cf/5e/cf5eaff1-2fa6-44dc-9583-5730377dcc38/telemedicine-global-vet-graphic.png__1200x1200_subsampling-2.png)

## Your staff just got a whole lot bigger.

We’re not just here for you, we’re here with you. Our radiology specialists are available 24/7/365, delivering reports in as little as 60 minutes. All of this happens on a user-friendly platform that seamlessly integrates with your existing software. By tapping into our global network of expertise, you get specialists at scale—without the need for a bigger break room.

## Specialists are our specialty.

With over 160 full time specialists globally, IDEXX offers unmatched experience.  
Our rigorous hiring protocols and peer review systems ensure high quality reports, for every case.

Expertise in radiology, cardiology, exotics, dentistry, dermatology, and more.

Backed by IDEXX-only telemedicine quality guarantee.

Take action with clear conclusions and recommendations in every report.

Our full-service team is available all day, every day.

## Support

### Documents and resources

Access product information, reference resources, and more.

### Current Customer? Contact Us

Customer service: 1-800-726-1212  
Invoice questions: 1-800-814-1147

### IDEXX Learning Center

Enroll in free courses and earn CE credits. All on your schedule.

## Find out how IDEXX Telemedicine Consultants can expand your diagnostic capabilities.

Please complete the form and an IDEXX sales representative will contact you.

Why choose IDEXX Telemedicine Consultants?

## Footer Navigation

![IDEXX](/static/img/logo/logo-white.03cb18b36364.svg)

IDEXX is a global leader in pet healthcare innovation. Our diagnostic and software products and services create clarity in a complex and evolving world.

# Gulf Coast Veterinary Specialists (GCVS)

![Staff member looking at radiograph images on a computer monitor](https://images.ctfassets.net/rt5zmd3ipxai/7vtsJFQUiP7kMhIczILusY/c1c3b8226139070f517bc5131290dadd/telemedicine_gcvs_varc2.jpg?fit=fill&fm=webp&h=567&w=816&q=75,%20https://images.ctfassets.net/rt5zmd3ipxai/7vtsJFQUiP7kMhIczILusY/c1c3b8226139070f517bc5131290dadd/telemedicine_gcvs_varc2.jpg?fit=fill&fm=webp&h=1134&w=1632&q=75 "Staff member looking at radiograph images on a computer monitor")

## Telemedicine

![Staff member looking at radiograph images on a computer monitor](https://images.ctfassets.net/rt5zmd3ipxai/7vtsJFQUiP7kMhIczILusY/c1c3b8226139070f517bc5131290dadd/telemedicine_gcvs_varc2.jpg?fit=fill&fm=webp&h=567&w=816&q=75,%20https://images.ctfassets.net/rt5zmd3ipxai/7vtsJFQUiP7kMhIczILusY/c1c3b8226139070f517bc5131290dadd/telemedicine_gcvs_varc2.jpg?fit=fill&fm=webp&h=1134&w=1632&q=75 "Staff member looking at radiograph images on a computer monitor")

## Telemedicine

[Login to Your Account](https://platform.abbadox.com/ "Login to Your Account")

[Register Here](/telemedicine-form "Register Here")

Gulf Coast Veterinary Specialists offers diagnostic imaging consultations for all modalities, providing advanced expertise to support veterinarians with complex cases. Our board-certified veterinary radiologists ensure personalized service with expert interpretations as well as accessible one-on-one support.

### Diagnostic Imaging Consultations

Our board-certified radiologists use cutting-edge technology to enhance the interpretation of radiographs, radiographic contrast studies, ultrasound, fluoroscopy, computed tomography (CT), and MRI studies, enabling precise diagnoses to support effective disease treatment.

### Our Unique Approach

**Specialized Expertise:** Our radiologists can collaborate with our in-house specialties (including [internal medicine](/services/internal-medicine), [avian and exotics](/services/avian-exotics), [surgery](/services/surgery-orthopedics), [oncology](/services/medical-oncology), ophthalmology, [critical care](/services/critical-care), [neurology](/services/neurology), and [dermatology](/services/dermatology)) to deliver the most comprehensive treatment recommendations.

**Experience You Can Trust:** We interpret tens of thousands of cases annually, offering unmatched insight and care for your patients.

### Billing & Pricing

GCVS offers competitive pricing. Contact us at [**[email protected]**](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#a383cacdc5cce3c4c0d5d7c6cfc6cec6c78dc0ccce) for our current fees.

**Invoices:**

Sent by 5th of each month

Includes detailed breakdown of each submission including owner/pet name, service type, and cost for interpretation

Payment options: online or via check/money order

## Diagnostic Imaging & Telemedicine

--- SOURCE 5: Telemedicine - Board Certified Veterinary Specialists ---
URL: https://www.dvmstat.com/

SUMMARY:
DVM STAT Consulting's Telemedicine Service is for veterinarians in the US and Canada. Our Specialists in the areas of Cardiology, Oncology, Radiology,

FULL CONTENT:
![DVM STAT Consulting](//images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e2c35b9e63e022a178f6a92/b2ac8c16-fbc8-43f6-b52c-6af9a41a360e/DVM-STATS---Version-2.png?format=1500w)
![DVM STAT Consulting](//images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e2c35b9e63e022a178f6a92/b2ac8c16-fbc8-43f6-b52c-6af9a41a360e/DVM-STATS---Version-2.png?format=1500w)
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e2c35b9e63e022a178f6a92/1729886631959-AX210NANNB5XQ916IITR/GettyImages-1516367662.jpg)

### **NEVER SECOND GUESS A DIAGNOSIS AGAIN**

## **24/7 Teleconsultation with Board-Certified Veterinary Specialists**

### **Specialist-Level Care. Right From Your Clinic.**

Our board-certified team works directly with you to interpret diagnostics, refine treatment plans, and guide client conversations - helping you provide the highest level of care without referral delays.

When you’re facing a complex case - from an unstable patient to a puzzling diagnosis - you need answers you can trust, fast. That’s where DVM STAT comes in.

Our board-certified specialists in Critical Care, Radiology, Oncology, Internal Medicine, Neurology, Cardiology, Clinical Pathology, and Surgery work directly with you to review records, interpret diagnostics, and create clear treatment plans you can act on immediately. We make collaboration easy with secure case submission, rapid communication, and practical recommendations that fit your patient’s needs and your client’s realities.

**Manage every case with specialist-level expertise - whether you’re referring or treating in-house.**

What Veterinarians Are Saying

About DVM STAT

## "I am so grateful to find DVM STAT. They provide such a valuable resource to our practice. It is rare to find any of our colleagues going out of their way to assist each other these days. Any time we have an issue or concern it is dealt with efficiently and quickly. I am so glad to have them integrated and a vital part of our team. Mutual care and respect is something to be cherished in the fast pace of today's practice. Thank you Dr. Welch and your entire team! We appreciate you! You guys are 10/10."

Jean, Practice Owner

## “DVM STAT Consulting is an amazing service that benefits both veterinarians and pet owners by providing specialist support for a variety of cases. Their highly competent and friendly board certified veterinary specialists and detailed case reports allow veterinarians to elevate the care for their patients and gain medical knowledge in the process. Every veterinary practice and relief practitioner should be using this service. ”

Cindy, Practice Owner

## “DVM STAT consulting has been a game-changer for me in my Relief business. It has helped me to learn and grow as a practitioner when I'm up against a critical care case that's beyond my expertise, and given me and many clients peace of mind. Each practice where I've used this service has gone on to open their own DVM STAT account and start using it regularly.”

Jennie, Relief Doctor

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e2c35b9e63e022a178f6a92/1693772142262-05NJXRWWBZLNUA5GE9TJ/image-asset.jpeg)

### Consultations for Licensed Veterinarians

### **Specialist Expertise for Every Case - When You Need It Most**

From unstable emergencies to complex medical puzzles, DVM STAT connects you with board-certified specialists who review your case, interpret diagnostics, and give you clear, actionable recommendations you can use immediately.

#### Emergency & Critical Care

**Complex Cases Are Our Specialty**

Immediate, in-depth support 24/7 for your sickest and most unstable patients. Our Criticalists guide you through urgent decision-making, help stabilize patients, and provide written follow-up so you can manage even the most critical cases with confidence.

#### Radiology & Diagnostic Ultrasound

**Fast, Expert Reports with Clear Conclusions**

High-quality interpretations of radiographs, ultrasounds, and CTs with practical recommendations you can use right away. Whether it’s STAT turnaround or routine review, our radiologists give you the clarity to move forward without second-guessing.

#### Internal Medicine

**Expert Co-Management for Complex Cases**

From puzzling lab results to multi-system disease, our internists dig into the details and give you a structured plan - diagnostics, treatment guidance, and client communication tools - so you can manage cases at the highest level.

#### Cardiology

**Direct Support for Optimal Cardiac Care**

Whether it’s a murmur, arrhythmia, or pre-anesthetic screening, our cardiologists help you know when to treat, when to monitor, and how to communicate next steps to clients with clarity.

#### Oncology

**Compassionate, Goal-Oriented Cancer Care**

Specialist support for staging, treatment planning, and quality-of-life management. Our oncologists partner with you to discuss all options with your clients — even when referral isn’t possible.

#### Neurology

**Support Before, During & After**

From seizures to spinal injuries, our neurologists guide you through localization, diagnostics, and treatment planning — so you can act decisively and with confidence.

#### Surgery

**From Surgical planning to Post-op Management**

Consult on complex surgical decisions, get stabilization and pre-op guidance, and receive post-op monitoring recommendations — plus orthopedic case planning and rehab protocols when needed.

#### Clinical Pathology

**The Complete Diagnostic Picture**

Expert cytology review, necropsy interpretation, and case synthesis that connects lab findings with the clinical story, giving you the insight to move forward with certainty.

### Why Choose DVM STAT?

**24/7 Access to Board-Certified Specialists**: Never face a challenging case alone

**No Ongoing Fees**: Pay only when you need us

**Accessible Case Support**: Consultations with written and/or phone guidance

**Safe & Secure:** Secure medical records portal for streamlined case management

**DICOM PACS**: One-time PACS set-up takes <10 minutes for rapid DICOM image transmission for all radiology & ultrasound images. IT support available

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e2c35b9e63e022a178f6a92/a0635b73-a5bd-4a8a-b247-f89a1657258e/DVM+STAT+Website2.png)

### HOW **TELECONSULTATION** HELPS VETERINARY TEAMS **SAVE TIME & IMPROVE CARE**

#### With **long referral delays, overbooked schedules, & complex cases** becoming more common, today’s veterinary teams need smarter solutions.

**Teleconsultation** is helping clinics nationwide:

Reduce wait times for specialty input

Deliver better outcomes without sending cases out

Keep clients informed and confident

Maintain in-house revenue and continuity of care

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e2c35b9e63e022a178f6a92/c0745597-eadd-4b4e-83e0-62c7d3c928fc/Screenshot+2025-07-01+at+11.30.10%E2%80%AFAM.png)

How Teleconsultation relieves pressure & improves outcomes

Which cases benefit most from a specialist’s input

How to easily integrate teleconsults into your workflow

How it compares to traditional referral care

### **In this** ***free*** **guide, you’ll learn**

## Get Your Free Guide

enriched_points.expanded_content: Veterinary telemedicine facilitates remote consultations, allowing veterinarians to utilize advanced imaging tools for accurate diagnostics without needing in-person visits.
Innovative platforms ensure the secure transmission of imaging data, protecting sensitive information while allowing specialists to access and interpret cases remotely.
Telemedicine enhances convenience for pet owners, enabling them to receive timely consultations and expert opinions from the comfort of their homes.
Telemedicine bridges the gap for pet owners in remote areas, providing access to specialty care and diagnostic services that may otherwise be unavailable.
The integration of wearable health monitoring devices enhances telemedicine, providing continuous data that aids veterinarians in assessing and managing patient health remotely.
